name: portfolio-sass
description: Portfolio styling — Tailwind CSS v3 + Bootstrap 5 + custom SCSS

scripts.js:copy: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/js', { recursive: true }); ['db.js', 'i18n.js', 'script.js'].forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync('src/assets/js/' + f, 'dist/js/' + f))"
scripts.js:watch: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const copy = () => ['db.js', 'i18n.js', 'script.js'].forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync('src/assets/js/' + f, 'dist/js/' + f)); fs.mkdirSync('dist/js', { recursive: true }); copy(); console.log('Watching JS files...'); fs.watch('src/assets/js', () => { copy(); console.log('JS files synced'); })"
scripts.build: npm run js:copy && npm run scss:build && npm run tw:build
scripts.dev: npm run js:watch & npm run scss:watch & npm run tw:watch
